CustomField.formula: OOEP_Grant_Total__c + OOLCH_Grant_Total__c + PR100EP_Grant_Total__c + PR100LCH_Grant_Total__c + PR50EP_Grant_Total__c + PR50LCH_Grant_Total__c + SHEP_Grant_Total__c + SHLCH_Grant_Total__c + PR50EP_Matched_Total__c + PR50LCH_Matched_Total__c + SHEP_Matched_Total__c + SHLCH_Matched_Total__c
CustomField.label: Total of Spend Per House
